hero.subtitle: Professional massage therapy tailored to your body and mind, in the heart of Gatineau.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Therapeutic treatments thoughtfully tailored to your wellbeing

swedish.title: Swedish Massage
swedish.description: A gentle, flowing full-body massage that promotes circulation, eases muscle tension, and induces deep, restorative relaxation.

deepTissue.title: Deep Tissue Massage
deepTissue.description: Targeting deeper layers of muscle and connective tissue to release chronic tension, address pain patterns, and restore mobility.

relaxation.title: Relaxation Massage
relaxation.description: A calming, nurturing treatment designed to soothe the nervous system, quiet the mind, and melt away the stress of everyday life.

prenatal.title: Prenatal Massage
prenatal.description: Specially adapted techniques to support expectant mothers through each trimester, easing discomfort and promoting restful wellbeing.

preview.title: Meet Olha Shelest
preview.subtitle: Professional Massage Therapist
preview.bio: With a deep passion for holistic healing and a commitment to excellence, Olha brings both expertise and genuine care to every treatment — helping you move, feel, and live better.

page.title: About Olha Shelest
page.subtitle: Professional Massage Therapist · Gatineau, QC
page.bio1: Olha Shelest is a Professional Massage Therapist based in Gatineau, Quebec. With a deep passion for holistic healing and an unwavering commitment to excellence, Olha brings both expertise and genuine care to every treatment.
page.bio2: Trained in a comprehensive range of therapeutic techniques, Olha specializes in helping clients overcome pain, recover from injury, manage stress, and achieve lasting relaxation. Her approach is always personalized — every session is thoughtfully tailored to your unique needs and health goals.
page.bio3: Olha believes that massage therapy is far more than a luxury. It is an essential component of a balanced, healthy lifestyle. Whether you are an athlete seeking faster recovery, someone managing chronic pain, or simply in need of deep relaxation, Olha is here to guide you on your path to wellness.
page.bio4: She welcomes clients of all backgrounds and adapts her techniques to suit each individual's comfort level and therapeutic objectives. Every visit is a step toward a healthier, more balanced you.
page.amqText: Olha is a verified member of the Association des Massothérapeutes du Québec (AMQ), ensuring her practice meets the highest professional and ethical standards in Quebec.

values.title: Personalized Care
values.description: Every session begins with a thorough consultation to understand your goals, health history, and preferences.

values.title: Evidence-Based Practice
values.description: Techniques grounded in anatomy and current research, continuously refined through professional development.

values.title: Safe & Professional
values.description: A comfortable, respectful environment where your wellbeing and comfort are always the top priority.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when you contact us through our website, including your name, email address, phone number, and the content of your message. We may also collect certain technical information automatically, such as your IP address and browser type, for security and analytics purposes.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information you provide solely to respond to your inquiries, schedule appointments, and communicate with you about our services. We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as required by law.

sections.title: 3. Health Information
sections.content: As part of providing massage therapy services, we may collect health-related information to ensure your safety and provide appropriate care. This information is treated with the utmost confidentiality and is protected in accordance with applicable Quebec privacy legislation.

sections.title: 4. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by applicable laws and professional regulations. Client health records are retained in accordance with AMQ standards.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: Under Quebec's Act Respecting the Protection of Personal Information in the Private Sector (Law 25) and Canada's PIPEDA, you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information. To exercise these rights, please contact us.

sections.title: 6. Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. Our contact form uses HTTPS encryption to protect data in transit.

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.content: Our website may use essential cookies to ensure proper functionality. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

sections.title: 8. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us.

cta.title: Ready to Feel Your Best?
cta.subtitle: Take the first step toward lasting wellness. Book a session with Olha today.
